title: helianthemum hirtum subsp. ruficomum
intro: Helianthemum hirtum subsp. ruficomum, also known as Rockrose or Rufous Rockrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum hirtum subsp. ruficomum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
